items.name: SDG India Index : 7th Sustainable Development Goal - Affordable and clean energy: Ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Households electrified under ministry of power in 2019 (%), Lpg+png connections against number of households as per mopng calculations as on 31072020 (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 6th Sustainable Development Goal - Clean water and sanitation: Ensure availability and sustainable management of water and sanitation for all
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Rural population getting safe and adequate drinking water within premises through pipe water supply (pws) (%), Rural population having improved source of drinking water (%), Individual household toilets constructed against target under swachh bharat mission (gramin) (%), Districts verified to be open defication free (odf) status under swachh bharat mission (gramin) (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 13th Sustainable Development Goal - Climate Action
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Human lives lost per 1 crore population due to extreme weather events, Disaster preparedness score as per disaster resilience index, Renewable energy out of total installed generating capacity (including allocated shares) (%), Co2 saved from light emitting diode (led) bulbs per 1,000 population; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 8th Sustainable Development Goal - Decent work and economic growth
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Annual growth rate of per capita gross domestic product (gdp) at constant prices, Ease of doing business (eodb) (feedback score), Unemployment rate in the age group of 15 to 59 years (%), Labour force participation rate (lfpr) (%) in the age group of 15 to 59 years; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 5th Sustainable Development Goal - Gender Equality
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Rate of crimes against women per 1,00,000 female population, Sex ratio at birth, Ratio of female to male average wage received among regular wage or salaried employees, Per lakh women who have experienced cruelty or physical violence by husband or his relatives during the year; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 3rd Sustainable Development Goal - Good Health and Well-being
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Maternal mortality ratio per 1,00,000 live births, Mortality rate per 1,000 live births under 5 years of age, Fully immunized children in the age group of 9 to 11 months (%), Notification rate of tuberculosis cases per 1,00,000 population; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 9th Sustainable Development Goal - Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Targeted habitations connected by all weather roads under pradhan mantri gram sadak yojana (pmgsy), Share of gross value added (gva) in manufacturing to total gross value added (gva) in current prices (%), Manufacturing employment as a percentage of total employment (%), Innovation score as per the india innovation index; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 14th Sustainable Development Goal - Life below Water
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Mean shore zone coastal water quality (biochemical oxygen demand (bod)), Mean shore zone coastal water quality (total nitrogen (tn)), Increase in area under mangroves (%), Average marine acidity (ph) measured at representative sampling stations in the shore zone; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 15th Sustainable Development Goal - Life on Land
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Forest covered to the total geographical area (%), Tree covered to the geographical area (%), Geographical area covered by forest and trees (%), Area covered under afforestation schemes to the total geographical area (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 1st Sustainable Development Goal - No Poverty
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Population living below the national poverty line (%), Head count ratio as per the multidimensional poverty index (%), Households with any usual member covered by a health scheme or health insurance (%), Persons provided employment to the persons who demanded employment under mahatma gandhi national rural employment guarantee act (mgnrega) (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 16th Sustainable Development Goal - Peace, justice and strong institutions
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Murders per 1,00,000 population, Cognizable crimes against children per 1,00,000 population, Victims of human trafficking per 10 lakh population, Missing children per 1,00,000 child population; by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 4th Sustainable Development Goal - Quality Education
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Adjusted net enrolment ratio (aner) in elementary education for classes 1 to 8, Average annual dropout rate at secondary level for classes 9 to 10, Gross enrolment ratio (ger) in higher secondary for classes 11 to 12, Students in grade viii achieving atleast a minimum proficiency level in terms of nationally defined learning outcomes to be attained by the pupils at the end of the grade (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 10th Sustainable Development Goal - Reduced Inequality
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Population in the lowest two wealth quintiles (%), Elected women over total seats in the state or ut(lok sabha elections) (%), Seats held by women in panchayati raj institutions (%), Scheduled caste (sc) or scheduled tribe (st) seats in state legislative assemblies (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 12th Sustainable Development Goal - Responsible consumption and production
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Per capita fossil fuel consumption, Use of nitrogenous fertilizer out of total n,p,k, (nitrogen, phosphorous, potassium) (%), Hazardous waste generated per 1,000 population, Quantity of hazardous waste recycled or utilized to total hazardous waste generated (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 11th Sustainable Development Goal - Sustainable cities and communities
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Urban households living in katcha houses (%), Deaths due to road accidents in urban areas per 1,00,000 population, Wards with 100 percent door to door waste collection under swachh bharat mission urban sbm(u) (%), Household toilets constructed against target (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : 2nd Sustainable Development Goal - Zero Hunger
items.description: Sustainable Development Goals; measures: Beneficiaries covered under national food security act (nfsa),2013 (%), Children who are underweight under five years of age (%), Children who are stunned under five years of age (%), Anaemic pregnant women in the age group of 15 to 49 years (%); by country/state; 2020-2020; NITI Aayog

items.name: SDG India Index : Composite score
